name: Bill Murray

acts.description: Pattern of aggressive and inappropriate behavior on film sets spanning decades, culminating in formal complaint on Being Mortal (2022)

behavior_summary: A production complaint on Being Mortal (2022) shut down the film. Multiple accounts of aggressive, boundary-violating behavior on sets over decades — a pattern enabled by his untouchable star status.

art.summary: Singular comic presence who evolved into a legitimate dramatic actor. One of the most beloved performers of his generation.

verdict.blurb: Everyone knew, everyone made excuses, and the persona of lovable rogue did exactly what it was designed to do: insulate him from consequences. Still charming, still problematic.
